allow: PowerShell(where.exe node 2>$null; where.exe npm 2>$null; where.exe npx 2>$null; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|npm|nvm' })

PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
